texto: Freedom from obsession is not about something you do
autor: it's about knowing who you are. It's about recognizing what sustains you and what exhausts you. What you love and what you think you love because you believe you can't have it. (p. 163)
explicacao: Citação de it's about knowing who you are. It's about recognizing what sustains you and what exhausts you. What you love and what you think you love because you believe you can't have it. (p. 163) sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Freedom from obsession is not about something you do” articula reflexao, geneen-roth, women em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como women.
